node.title: Uber interview: what is "Depth in Specialization" round ?

topic.title: Uber interview: what is "Depth in Specialization" round ?

post.content: I have a interview scheduled with Uber this week, could you please let me know what\'s the Depth in Specialization round is?

They will share a sample project with you during the round and you have to do a code review/performance analysis/discuss what can be done better. They might ask to to modify some of the code as per the best practices whatever you tell them. That\'s what I had during my Android round for L5A.

I attended the interview this week, for Android position. I was given an android project and was asked to do code review. Then I was asked to implement a feature in the same codebase in my Android Studio IDE. Focus was mostly on how I provided various options to solve the problem, compared pros and cons, and in-depth knowledge in understanding how Recycler view works, find bugs in the existing codebase etc.,
If it is first round then it will be a coding round.
@jacksonrr24 Can you please share the sample questions? This is my first time attending a round of Machine Coding in ML.
Are you done with the interview? if yes, Can you please share the details?
